set the Artist reference of this GmeObject.
addCollider(Collider) - Method in class javashooter.gameobjects.GameObject
Add a javashooter.collider to the existing list of colliders.

Adds a graphics object to a level.
addObjectNow(GameObject) - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Adds a graphics object to a level.
allowedEvents() - Method in class javashooter.controller.Simple4WayController
 
AnimatedGameobject - Class in javashooter.gameobjects
Convenience Class subclassing GameObject, pre-creationg a subclass of Artist that draws a bitmap animation described by the Animation class.

Constructor.
Animation - Class in javashooter.playground
 
Animation(String) - Constructor for class javashooter.playground.Animation
 
AnimationArtist - Class in javashooter.rendering
Rendering an object by displaying a predefined Animation, i.e., a sequence of bitmaps.
AnimationArtist(GameObject, Animation, double, String, double) - Constructor for class javashooter.rendering.AnimationArtist
 
applyGameLogic() - Method in class javashooter.playground.MousePickerLevel
applies the logic of the level: For now, this is just about deleting shots that are leaving the screen
applyGameLogic() - Method in class javashooter.playground.Playground
Method meant to be filled with own code, handles the entire game logic (collision checks, timed events, ...).
applySpeedVector() - Method in class javashooter.controller.ObjectController
Convenience method: simply moves the object forward one step from its present position, using its present speed.
Artist - Class in javashooter.rendering
Base class for all Artists that draw GameObject instances.
Artist(GameObject) - Constructor for class javashooter.rendering.Artist
